reviews.comment:
Hay que tener cuidado, mi mujer fue a hacer un cambio de aceite y sin preguntarle le pusieron el más caro.
Me parece que el ACA no controla como debería a los concesionarios.
En una época era muy común que no "funcionaran" los lectores de tarjetas.

(Translated by Google)
You have to be careful; my wife went to get an oil change and they put in the most expensive one without even asking.
I think the ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina) doesn't regulate dealerships as it should.
At one time, it was very common for card readers not to work.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/7368196998032183080/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUM2eE5uNmh3RRAB
